Video.summary: High-energy chef and seafood expert Spencer Watts shows how crusts and coatings add tantalizing texture to rich tuna and fresh, tangy oysters.
Video.title: Crusted/Coated

Video.summary: Sturgeon and prawns meet wines and liqueurs in Chef Spencer Watts' kitchen as he brings seafood and booze together in delicious culinary concoctions.
Video.title: Boozy

Video.summary: Meaty prawns and melt-in-your-mouth cod are on the menu as trendy chef and seafood expert Spencer Watts gets a little salty with seafood.
Video.title: Salty

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts dishes on delicious ways to stuff rainbow trout and oysters and how to use them to stuff in a sandwich or even an avocado parcel.
Video.title: Stuffed

Video.summary: Fish loves spice and Chef Spencer Watts loves fish so he brings the delicious world of spice to halibut and lobster along with some cooling sides.
Video.title: Spice

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts shows how the burst of acidity from lemon, lime, orange and grapefruit adds enticing flavor to mild mahi-mahi and sweet scallops.
Video.title: Citrus

Video.summary: Seafood loving chef Spencer Watts gets casual and formal with monkfish and clam recipes that feature some of his favorite libations - beer and wine.
Video.title: Beer and Wine

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts shows that seafood may be great on its own, but when bringing different kinds together - it makes for some great eating.
Video.title: Mixed

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts shares some of his favorite mackerel and mussel recipes that highlight aromatic, vibrant and fresh herbs.
Video.title: Herb

Video.summary: Seafood loving Chef Spencer Watts makes perch and crab the hidden star in tamales, dumplings, spring rolls and poppers.
Video.title: Hidden

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts is making a cookbook all about fish; he cooks up some swordfish and scallop recipes that feature some of his favorite nuts.
Video.title: Nutty

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts brings bacon butter, brown butter, maple butter and chimichurri butter to this fishy party.
Video.title: Butter

Video.summary: Seafood lover Chef Spencer Watts soaks sablefish in a root beer and fennel marinade and serves it with creamy, grilled bok choy; Spencer dresses sablefish in a mole sauce that has a hint of maple and chocolate; lobster has its sweet side.
Video.title: Sweet

Video.summary: Showcasing the small yet mighty seed, chef Spencer Watts cooks up some sunflower seed crusted sole and beer and mustard seed battered squid.
Video.title: Seeds

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts whips up some garlicky treats with haddock rice balls with garlic scape pesto and escargot and mushroom puff pastry tarts.
Video.title: Garlic

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts makes salmon and prawns pop with flavor as he works with any seafood kitchen's must-have ingredient: flavored oils.
Video.title: Oil

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts adds bread and pastry to Canadian cod and squid.
Video.title: Breaded

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts creates recipes that combine sour and tart flavors with grouper clams.
Video.title: Tart

Video.summary: Spencer Watts shows how to enjoy fish served cold with arctic char pate & tequila shrimp ceviche.
Video.title: Cold

Video.summary: Seafood loving chef Spencer Watts brings the party with mojito marinated mahi mahi, cosmo crab hush puppies and coconut, rum and pineapple king crab.
Video.title: Cocktails

Video.summary: Chef and seafood expert Spencer Watts showcases the perfect pairing of vinegar and fish with balsamic marinated walleye, gastrique lobster and crawfish popcorn.
Video.title: Vinegar

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts shows how tea and coffee can add a lot of flavor to tuna and mussels.
Video.title: Coffee/Tea

Video.summary: It's a wrap when seafood loving chef Spencer Watts creates his favorite wrapped fish dishes including swordfish wellington and shrimp rolls.
Video.title: Wrapped

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts gets saucy with seafood, making a mascarpone sauce and crab sauce for salmon and orange aioli and clarified butter for crab.
Video.title: Saucy

Video.summary: Spencer mixes the sweet flavors of fruit and fish as he makes dishes with salmon and scallops.
Video.title: Fruit

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts shows how easy and incredibly delicious cooking a whole fish or shellfish can be.
Video.title: Whole

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts creates some dairy infused dishes using red snapper and scampi.
Video.title: Dairy

Video.summary: Spencer spices things up as he makes pepper-inspired dishes with catfish and clams.
Video.title: Peppers

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts creates fun surf and turf dishes featuring halibut and lobster.
Video.title: Surf & Turf

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts cooks up fast faves using scallops and trout, all done in under 30 minutes.
Video.title: Fast Favs
